notes: Specialty boundary is narrow to full-stack delivery support artifacts and explicitly excludes platform operations, live incident execution, commercial strategy, legal or contractual signoff, editorial approval, and formal attestation.

Authority sources cover professional frameworks, client-delivery workflow guidance, quality-review and confidentiality references, official language/runtime/framework docs, API standards, HTTP semantics, and secure software development guidance.
Evaluation evidence covers 18 scenarios, all mapped in evaluation/functionality-map.json and represented in evaluation/results.json.
Research summary satisfies the professional-and-information-services domain research pack and records runtime ambiguities as non-blocking prerequisites or refusal boundaries.
Runtime strategy remains specification-based. No retained implementation ownership is claimed without future frequent-use promotion evidence.
